name: egovframe-guardian
description: Codex plugin for eGovFrame development guidance, examples, and standard-compliance guardrails.

interface.shortDescription: Develop and review eGovFrame projects with local standards guardrails.
interface.longDescription: Packages the eGovFrame developer skill, official portal reference bundle, repository atlas, reusable examples, and hook-driven project checks for common eGovFrame architecture, mapper, transaction, and secret-handling issues.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the eGovFrame Guardian plugin to build, review, migrate, or verify an eGovFrame project. Consult the bundled eGovFrame developer skill and run the local guardrail scanner before claiming compliance.
